#12 0.093 
#12 0.093 [tool.pytest.ini_options]
#12 0.093 # durations=0 will display all tests execution time, sorted in ascending order starting from the slowest one.
#12 0.093 # -vv will also display tests with duration = 0.00s
#12 0.093 addopts = "--verbose --pyargs --durations=0 --strict-markers"  # always add these arguments to pytest
#12 0.093 testpaths = ["tests"]
#12 0.093 # directories to ignore when discovering tests
#12 0.093 norecursedirs = [
#12 0.093     "nemo_gym",
#12 0.093     "external",
#12 0.093     "examples",
#12 0.093     "docs",
#12 0.093     "scripts",
#12 0.093     "tools",
#12 0.093     "tutorials",
#12 0.093     "*.egg",
#12 0.093     ".*",
#12 0.093     "_darcs",
#12 0.093     "build",
#12 0.093     "CVS",
#12 0.093     "dist",
#12 0.093     "venv",
#12 0.093     "{arch}"
#12 0.093 ]
#12 0.093 log_cli = true
#12 0.093 log_cli_level = "INFO"
#12 0.093 cache_dir = "cache/.pytest_cache"
#12 0.093 filterwarnings = "ignore::DeprecationWarning"
#12 0.093 asyncio_mode = "auto"
#12 0.093 # markers to select tests, use `pytest --markers` to see all available markers, `pytest -m "<marker>"` to select tests
#12 0.093 markers = [
#12 0.093     "unit: marks unit test, i.e. testing a single, well isolated functionality (deselect with '-m \"not unit\"')",
#12 0.093     "integration: marks test checking the elements when integrated into subsystems (deselect with '-m \"not integration\"')",
#12 0.093     "system: marks test working at the highest integration level (deselect with '-m \"not system\"')",
#12 0.093     "acceptance: marks test checking whether the developed product/model passes the user defined acceptance criteria (deselect with '-m \"not acceptance\"')",
#12 0.093     "docs: mark tests related to documentation (deselect with '-m \"not docs\"')",
#12 0.093     "skipduringci: marks tests that are skipped during ci as they are addressed by Jenkins jobs but should be run to test user setups",
#12 0.093     "pleasefixme: marks tests that are broken and need fixing",
#12 0.093 ]
#12 0.093 
#12 0.093 [tool.coverage.run]
#12 0.093 command_line = "-m pytest --durations=10"
#12 0.093 omit = [
#12 0.093     "tests/*",
#12 0.093     "temp*",
#12 0.093     "results/*",
#12 0.093     "/tmp/*",
#12 0.093     "benchmarks/*",
#12 0.093 ]
#12 0.093 data_file = "results/.coverage"
#12 0.093 concurrency = ["thread", "multiprocessing"]
#12 0.093 
#12 0.093 [tool.coverage.paths]
#12 0.093 source = ["nemo_gym/", "/workspace/nemo_gym"]
#12 0.093 
#12 0.093 [tool.coverage.html]
#12 0.093 directory = "results/htmlcov"
#12 0.093 
#12 0.093 [tool.coverage.report]
#12 0.093 skip_covered = true
#12 0.093 sort = "miss"
#12 0.093 fail_under = 96.0
#12 0.093 exclude_also = [
#12 0.093     "def __repr__",
#12 0.093     "if self.debug:",
#12 0.093     "if settings.DEBUG",
#12 0.093     "raise AssertionError",
#12 0.093     "raise NotImplementedError",
#12 0.093     "if 0:",
#12 0.093     "if __name__ == .__main__.:",
#12 0.093     "if TYPE_CHECKING:",
#12 0.093     "class .*\\bProtocol\\):",
#12 0.093     "@(abc\\.)?abstractmethod",
#12 0.093     "pass",
#12 0.093 ]
